name: Sylvia Syms
abstract: Sylvia Syms (December 2, 1917 – May 10, 1992) was an American jazz singer. One music journalist noted that she was "One of America's most distinguished cabaret and jazz singers with a profound appreciation of lyrics".

about_quotes.speaker: Al Gafa
about_quotes.evidence: I started working with a lot of singers in town... They were Sylvia Syms, Johnny Hartman, Sammy Davis, Susannah McCorkle
about_quotes.doc_title: Al Gafa interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, May 2, 2023
